summary: Backend-only testing of Supporter Subscription System ('Pilastro della Community') completed. All 12 tests passed (100%). Stripe integration is fully functional - checkout URLs are generated correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/subscription/my-status correctly returns is_supporter, subscription_status, supporter_since, subscription_id fields
POST /api/subscription/create-checkout creates valid Stripe checkout session with proper metadata (user_id, user_email, plan_id)
GET /api/subscription/status/{session_id} polls Stripe and updates user as supporter when payment_status=paid
GET /api/subscription/manage-url correctly requires is_supporter=true before returning portal URL
POST /api/webhook/stripe handles checkout.session.completed and subscription cancellation events
Error handling is robust - invalid webhooks return error status instead of crashing
Transaction logging in payment_transactions collection for audit trail
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription backend APIs fully tested: my-status, create-checkout, status/{session_id}, manage-url, webhook/stripe. Stripe test mode active (sk_test_emergent). Checkout URLs generated successfully (e.g., https://checkout.stripe.com/...). Frontend components (supporter.tsx, SupporterBadge.tsx) exist but frontend testing blocked by ngrok tunnel instability.

subscription_endpoints.test_get_my_subscription_status_success: PASSED - returns {is_supporter: bool, subscription_status, supporter_since, subscription_id}
subscription_endpoints.test_create_checkout_success: PASSED - returns valid checkout_url and session_id

stripe_webhook.test_webhook_no_signature: PASSED - handles gracefully with error status
stripe_webhook.test_webhook_with_invalid_body: PASSED - handles gracefully with error status

subscription_flow.test_full_subscription_flow: PASSED - check status -> create checkout -> verify session works end-to-end

user_model.test_user_me_contains_supporter_fields: PASSED - badges field present in user response
